global_principles.reduced_motion: Honor prefers-reduced-motion via framer-motion's useReducedMotion(): drop translate (y=0) and set duration to 0; keep opacity transitions instant. All motion variants below already encode this fallback.

tailwind_primitives.input-focus: transition-[border-color,box-shadow] duration-200 ease-out focus-visible:border-brand-primary focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-brand-primary/40 focus-visible:outline-none

motion.notes: Parent variants drive child entrance order: eyebrow → title → subtitle. Above the fold — animate on mount, not scroll.
Two-column row sits ~580px from top — still mostly above the fold at 1920×1854, but use whileInView with once:true for safety. Stagger children by 0.08s.
Each of the 3 ContactInfoCard instances animates in sequence under the parent stagger-children.
Right column form fades in as one block (not field-by-field — would feel fussy).

components.notes: Hero block (eyebrow + title + subtitle) plays a stagger entrance on mount since it's above the fold. The two-column row (info cards + form) uses whileInView to defer animation until in viewport on smaller screens.

motion.notes: Subtle -translate-y-0.5 (2px) plus soft shadow. Only applies when href is set (tel:/mailto:) — non-linked office card stays static. Builder: conditionally apply class string based on `href` prop.

actions.rationale: Phone card href='tel:+919870347348', email card href='mailto:info@bodhischoolofyoga.com' — wraps the card in <a> when href is set. Office card (href=null) renders as <div> (non-interactive).

components.notes: Card-level entrance is driven by parent stagger variants in ContactSection — ContactInfoCard exposes a `variants` or accepts being wrapped in motion.div by parent. Local interaction is hover-lift + click-to-call/email.

motion.notes: Already in code per user note: ring-2 brand-primary. Confirmed pattern: border transition + 2px brand-primary ring at 40% opacity on focus-visible. Applies to firstName, mobile, email, helpWith.
Tiny -translate-y-0.5 + mint-tinted soft shadow on hover. Pairs with press-scale on active.
When isSubmitting flips true, the 'Sending…' label cross-fades over 'Send Message' (AnimatePresence mode='wait').

actions.rationale: Form already handles async submit via onSubmit prop — no navigation. Button disables + shows 'Sending…' during in-flight.

components.notes: Form is fully non-navigational. All interactivity is field focus + submit-state transitions. Loading state animates label swap; do NOT add a spinner unless explicitly designed.

motion.notes: Whole section fades up as one block when it scrolls into view. Already a reuse-as-is component — verify existing implementation uses RevealOnScroll; if not, wrap it.
Optional: italic mint 'you are.' phrase fades up a beat after the rest of the headline. Keep delay subtle — should feel like one motion, not two.

actions.rationale: Per user instructions: 'Try-a-Class CTA goes to /try-a-class (already wired in existing FooterBrandCta usage).' Note: decomposition.json shows props.cta_href='/classes' — defer to existing wired href in the FooterBrandCta consumer.
actions.verify: Confirm the page assembly passes ctaHref='/try-a-class' (or that the component default is correct).

components.notes: Reuse-as-is — most motion should already exist. interaction-designer's role here is to document expected behavior, not re-spec.
Reuse-as-is. Existing component already handles nav-link hover-underline, mobile menu toggle, and logo→/ navigation. No new spec needed.
Reuse-as-is. Existing component handles its own link hover states.

ContactSection_parent_variants.reduced_motion_note: Wrap with useReducedMotion(); if true, set child.hidden.y = 0 and child.visible.transition.duration = 0.

implementation_hints.AnimatePresence_submit_label: import { AnimatePresence, motion } from 'framer-motion'; wrap label with mode='wait', key on isSubmitting boolean.
implementation_hints.reuse_RevealOnScroll: For form_container and FooterBrandCta, prefer the existing apps/web/src/components/ui/reveal-on-scroll.tsx wrapper — it already encodes the house easing + reduced-motion fallback.

unresolved.reason: Submit button has no navigation — handled by async onSubmit (per user instruction). No href to resolve. Recorded here for transparency, not as a missing value.

Decomposition.json has cta_href='/classes' but user instruction says the page wires it to '/try-a-class'. Builder must verify the page-level prop override matches user intent — flagged for visual-qa to confirm.
